name: Vegetarian Supper Dish
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tomatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice as directed on package, reducing salt to 1/2 teaspoon.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in oil until the onion is tender.
3. Add zucchini, green pepper, oregano, and pepper; cook vegetables until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and beans; cover and heat thoroughly.
5. Add salt, if desired.
6. Spoon hot rice onto a serving platter.
7. Spoon the vegetable mixture over the rice.
8. Sprinkle with cheese.
7 servings
